languages.text: {n}Чудо, что аугментика вообще сохранилась. Однако сейчас она выглядит скверно и вряд ли пригодна к установке. Впрочем, наверняка на вашем флагмане ее смогут починить.{/n}
{n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Чудо, что аугментика вообще сохранилась. Однако сейчас она выглядит скверно и вряд ли пригодна к установке. Впрочем, наверняка на вашем флагмане ее смогут починить.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}
{n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}
{n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}補強された機体は、残念ながら使用不能な状態ではあったが、それでも生き残ったことに驚嘆する。旗艦のスタッフは、それを修復できるはずだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 補強された機体は、残念ながら使用不能な状態ではあったが、それでも生き残ったことに驚嘆する。旗艦のスタッフは、それを修復できるはずだ。

languages.text: {n}Ogmetiğin acınası, kullanılamaz bir hâlde de olsa günümüze kadar gelebilmiş olması bir mucize. Sancak gemindeki personel onu onarabilir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ogmetiğin acınası, kullanılamaz bir hâlde de olsa günümüze kadar gelebilmiş olması bir mucize. Sancak gemindeki personel onu onarabilir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es milagroso que el aumético haya sobrevivido, aun en un estado lamentable e inutilizable. El personal de tu nave insignia debería poder restaurarlo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es milagroso que el aumético haya sobrevivido, aun en un estado lamentable e inutilizable. El personal de tu nave insignia debería poder restaurarlo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这个植入物能够幸存下来真是个奇迹。虽说状况不佳，无法使用，但你旗舰上的工作人员应该有能力修复它。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这个植入物能够幸存下来真是个奇迹。虽说状况不佳，无法使用，但你旗舰上的工作人员应该有能力修复它。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'augmétique est trop abîmé pour être utilisable en l'état, mais le simple fait qu'il soit toujours entier tient du miracle. Le personnel à bord de votre vaisseau amiral doit pouvoir le réparer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'augmétique est trop abîmé pour être utilisable en l'état, mais le simple fait qu'il soit toujours entier tient du miracle. Le personnel à bord de votre vaisseau amiral doit pouvoir le réparer.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es ist ein Wunder, dass die Augmentation die Zeiten überdauert hat, wenngleich in einem erbärmlichen Zustand. Deine Leute auf dem Flaggschiff können sie gewiss wiederherstellen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a marvel that the augmetic survived at all, albeit in a sorry, unusable state. The staff on your flagship should be capable of restoring it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es ist ein Wunder, dass die Augmentation die Zeiten überdauert hat, wenngleich in einem erbärmlichen Zustand. Deine Leute auf dem Flaggschiff können sie gewiss wiederherstellen.{/n}
